[Task12]
n = E103ABD94892E3E74AFD724BF28E78366D9676BCCC70118BD0AA1968DBB143D1
phi(n) = E103ABD94892E3E74AFD724BF28E78348D52298BD687C44DEB3A81065A7981A4
d = 3587A24598E5F2A21DB007D89D18CC50ABA5075BA19A33890FE7C28A9B496AEB
(e*d) mod phi(n) = 01

[Task13]
M ASCII = A top secret!
M hex = 4120746f702073656372657421
C hex = 6FB078DA550B2650832661E14F4F8D2CFAEF475A0DF3A75CACDC5DE5CFC5FADC
Decrypt(C) with d = 4120746F702073656372657421
Decrypted ASCII = A top secret!

[Task14]
C hex = 8C0F971DF2F3672B28811407E2DABBE1DA0FEBBBDFC7DCB67396567EA1E2493F
M hex = 50617373776F72642069732064656573
M ASCII = Password is dees

[Task15]
M1 ASCII = I owe you $2000.
M1 hex = 49206f776520796f752024323030302e
S1 hex = 55A4E7F17F04CCFE2766E1EB32ADDBA890BBE92A6FBE2D785ED6E73CCB35E4CB

M2 hex = 49206f776520796f752024333030302e
S2 hex = BCC20FB7568E5D48E434C387C06A6025E90D29D848AF9C3EBAC0135D99305822
